concerns.text: FR-011 appears under 'Clarification needed' section rather than the main Functional Requirements list. While its scope clearly serves User Story 2 (engagement score construction), it lacks explicit story anchoring. Consider integrating into main FR list with traceability note (e.g., 'Anchored to User Story 2').

SC-006 (power analysis / events-per-predictor rule) has no explicit story anchor. Its scope clearly relates to User Story 1 (data filtering/sample size), but the connection should be documented for traceability (e.g., 'See US-1' or 'Anchored to User Story 1').
